room.caption: [G3-4H] You want it, you need it.

instance.creationCode: stringToShow="Dash Practice Room ->#Spoilers: It's not very good." signSize=1

stringToShow="Unlike earlier versions of DT1, you do not need to let go of [Left] or [Right] to get the full benefit.#As long as you are holding forward, you will get the full speed of the dash." signSize=3

stringToShow="Pressing forward or back during a dash will cut the dash short. This is useful for making use of its invincibility frames without having to make use of its long jump distance." signSize=3
stringToShow="Don't forget that the back dash is useful for a quick dodge back while keeping your current facing direction." signSize=2
stringToShow="The cleaning crew sprayed for bugs and removed them." signSize=1

sprite_index=sCV_Gems image_speed=0 image_blend=make_color_rgb(100,100,100) type=1
var gameProgCheck; gameProgCheck=string_char_at(global.gameGate3Prog,1) if gameProgCheck="3" or gameProgCheck="4" image_blend=c_white

sprite_index=sCV_Gems image_speed=0 image_index=1 image_blend=make_color_rgb(100,100,100) type=1
if global.gameProgress>=1360 image_blend=c_white

sprite_index=sDashBoots image_speed=0 soundToPlay=global.snd_HeartPiece stringToShow="You have found the Dash Boots!" fadingTime=60 boxSize=1
if global.gameProgress>=1380 instance_destroy()
